title: Clan Sliverslash
subtitle: Early Power of the Exiled Lands
body: Among the first clans to make a name in the Exiled Lands, Clan Sliverslash had already risen to prominence in the era of Gimli and Muriela's Hope. Theirs was a time of struggle, when new powers rose and fell - and Sliverslash counted among those who left their mark on it.

Years later, under a new leader, the clan reformed and moved to the frozen north - though its strength was already in decline. Their last great act was the sacking of the Nordic settlement of Heimskringl. A diplomacy had been attempted; but the very moment an agreement was within reach to prevent bloodshed, an accidental shot from one of the defenders' trebuchets triggered the slaughter.
After that final blaze, the name of Sliverslash faded from the Lands.
